complete_user_guide/features/collinearit.检测运行后，共线性组的判定结果会出现在 :ref:`检测与反馈` 的复检页面中。: After an inspection runs, each collinearity group's verdict appears on the Review page of :ref:`检测与反馈`. Collinearity defects are listed under the **Collinearity Check** error type, and the Feature Error panel shows the following for every member of the group:
complete_user_guide/features/collinearit.**组判定** — 该共线性组的整体判定，取值为 **通过**、**失败** 或: **Group verdict** — the overall verdict for this collinearity group: **PASS**, **FAIL**, or **INDETERMINATE**.
complete_user_guide/features/collinearit.**位置（行 X, 列 Y）** — 当前成员在网格中的行列坐标。: **Position (row X, col Y)** — the member's row and column coordinates within the grid.
complete_user_guide/features/collinearit.**列方向偏差** / **行方向偏差** / **角度偏差** — 成员实测位: **Column offset** / **Row offset** / **Angle offset** — each member's deviation from the position predicted by the fitted lattice; the member fails if any one exceeds the group's corresponding threshold.
complete_user_guide/features/collinearit.**成员已丢弃（无对齐）** — 某成员在本次检测中未能完成对齐时，该成员被排除: **Member dropped (no alignment)** — when a member could not be aligned during this inspection, it is excluded from the fit and marked accordingly.
complete_user_guide/features/collinearit.当组判定为 **无法判定** 时，面板会一并显示 **原因**，可能为：: When the group verdict is **INDETERMINATE**, the panel also shows a **Reason**, which may be:
complete_user_guide/features/collinearit.**组尚未拟合 — 请在示教页运行拟合。**: **Group not fitted yet — run Fit on the Teach page.**
